title: United Arab Emirates RAKEZ Free Zone Establishment/Company Registration
description: Application to register and licence a new company with the Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone Authority (RAKEZ), either as a single-shareholder Free Zone Establishment (FZE) or a multi-shareholder Free Zone Company (FZC/FZ-LLC). Covers legal form, proposed company name options, share capital, primary business activity, license type (Commercial/Consulting-Services/Industrial/Educational), the first shareholder's details, the manager's details, the requested facility (Flexi Desk, Standard/Executive Office, Retail, Warehouse, or Plot of Land), and the closing undertaking/declaration. Does not model the separate detailed application form required for Industrial-activity licenses, per-shareholder repeating detail beyond the first of up to five shareholders, the post-approval Memorandum of Association/Lease Agreement/Personnel Secondment Agreement execution steps, or visa/immigration processing (see VERIFICATION.md). It does not submit the application; RAKEZ's own Client Portal (eportal.rakez.com) and RAKEZ itself are always authoritative.

authority.name: Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone Authority (RAKEZ)

source.documentRef: Application for Registration and Licence of a Free Zone Establishment or Company, Issue No. 03, Issued by QEMR, Issue Date Feb 18, 2016, Ref: LCN-019(A)

verification.notes: United Arab Emirates' Business Formation vertical was rated WEAK/login-gated in GOV-1289's research cycle (the mainland Ministry of Economy / DED channels and RAKEZ's own eportal.rakez.com are all authenticated-account-gated) and not revisited since. This cycle re-screened it and found RAKEZ's own 'Application for Registration and Licence of a Free Zone Establishment or Company' — a genuine AcroForm PDF with ~100 real named form fields, hosted directly on rakez.com with no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate, still cross-referenced from RAKEZ's own current company-formation checklist ('filling the Application Form' is documented as a valid alternative to the Client Portal). Extracted via pdfjs-dist (AcroForm annotation + text-content coordinate cross-referencing, not OCR/rendering, since the form carries genuine field widgets). This closes the Business Formation vertical to 17/17 jurisdictions (100%) and gives the United Arab Emirates its 5th of 6 verticals (Passport remains open-but-weak per GOV-1533).

fields.name: legalForm
fields.label: Legal Form
fields.description: Whether the applicant is establishing a single-shareholder Free Zone Establishment (FZE) or a multi-shareholder Free Zone Company (FZC).
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.1, 1.a Legal Form

fields.name: proposedNameOption1
fields.label: Proposed Company Name — Option 1
fields.description: First-choice proposed trade name. RAKEZ reserves the right to select any of the up to three proposed options, or to propose a different name if none are available.
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.1, 1.b Proposed Names

fields.name: shareCapitalAed
fields.label: Share Capital (AED)
fields.description: Total declared share capital of the company, in UAE Dirhams (AED).

fields.label: Total Number of Shares

fields.name: parValueAed
fields.label: Par Value (AED)
fields.description: Par value of each share. The source form states this must be a minimum of AED 1,000, or a multiple thereof (the 'multiple of 1,000' half of this rule is not machine-validated in this version — GovSchema v0.3's validation vocabulary has no multipleOf keyword).
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.1, 1.c Share Capital Details

fields.name: activityDetails
fields.label: Activity Details
fields.description: Free-text description of the company's proposed business activity/activities.
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.1, 1.d Activity Details

fields.name: licenseType
fields.label: License Type
fields.description: In case of Industrial Activities, the source form directs the applicant to also complete a separate, more detailed application form (not modelled in this version — see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.1, 1.e License Type

fields.name: shareholderName
fields.label: Shareholder 1: Name
fields.description: As per passport (for a natural-person shareholder) or Certificate of Registration (for a corporate shareholder). The form provides for up to five shareholders; this and the following seven fields model the first shareholder only, per this registry's convention for repeating groups (GovSchema v0.3 has no array field type).
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.1, 2. Shareholder(s) Details, Shareholder 1

fields.name: shareholderMotherName
fields.label: Shareholder 1: Mother Name
fields.description: Applicable only when Shareholder 1 is a natural person (the form has no separate shareholder-type selector; a corporate shareholder would leave this blank).
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.1, 2. Shareholder(s) Details, Shareholder 1

fields.name: shareholderAddressContact
fields.label: Shareholder 1: Address & Contact Details
fields.description: Address, phone, and email, entered as a single free-text block in the source form.
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.1, 2. Shareholder(s) Details, Shareholder 1

fields.name: flexiFacilityType
fields.label: Flexi Facility Type
fields.description: One of five mutually-exclusive facility subsections (Flexi/Standard/Retail/Warehouse/Plot of Land) the applicant selects; only the chosen subsection's fields apply. The source form does not have a single combined facility-category selector field — each subsection is its own independent set of widgets (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.2, 4. Facility Details, Flexi Facilities

fields.name: standardFacilityType
fields.label: Standard Facility Type
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.2, 4. Facility Details, Standard Facilities

fields.name: standardFacilitySpecification
fields.label: Standard Facility — please specify
fields.description: Required in practice only when standardFacilityType is selected (not machine-gated: the Condition grammar has no field-presence operator, and standardFacilityType is itself optional, so a requiredWhen keyed off it would misfire — see VERIFICATION.md). The source form provides a separate 'please specify' text box for each of the five Standard Facility options; this field represents whichever one the applicant completed, matching the option chosen in standardFacilityType.
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.2, 4. Facility Details, Standard Facilities

fields.name: standardFacilitySizeSqm
fields.label: Standard Facility — Size (M²)
fields.description: Only present for the Executive Office, Special Executive Office, and Shell & Core Facility options.
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.2, 4. Facility Details, Standard Facilities

fields.name: retailFacilityParkLocation
fields.label: Retail Facility — Service block located in
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.2, 4. Facility Details, Retail Facilities

fields.name: warehouseParkLocation
fields.label: Warehouse — Location
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.3, 4. Facility Details, Warehouse

fields.name: warehouseUnitCatalogSelection
fields.label: Warehouse — Unit Catalog Selection
fields.description: The source form prints a fixed rate-card table of four available warehouse unit sizes (150 M² / 10.5 KW, only warehouse space; 205 M² / 15 or 30 KW, with storage/office/complimentary services; 300 M² / 10.5 KW, with storage/office/complimentary services; 416 M² / 30 or 60 KW, with storage/office/complimentary services), each with its own selection checkbox. This field models which catalog row was checked; the table's own static area/power/description text is not modelled as applicant data (see VERIFICATION.md). Use warehouseOtherSpecification instead for a non-catalog request.
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.3, 4. Facility Details, Warehouse

fields.name: warehouseUnitNumber
fields.label: Warehouse — Unit Number
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.3, 4. Facility Details, Warehouse

fields.name: warehousePowerRatingKw
fields.label: Warehouse — Power (KW)
fields.description: The 205 M² and 416 M² catalog units each offer a choice between two power ratings (15 or 30 KW; 30 or 60 KW respectively); the 150 M² and 300 M² units are fixed at 10.5 KW.
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.3, 4. Facility Details, Warehouse

fields.name: warehouseOtherSpecification
fields.label: Warehouse — Others
fields.description: Free-text override for a warehouse requirement outside the four printed catalog units.
fields.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.3, 4. Facility Details, Warehouse

documents.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.2, 3. Manager Details ('Note: If residency Status is Yes, a no-objection certificate from the sponsor is required'); Checklist item 7.c

documents.label: Undertaking attestation
documents.statement: I/we hereby certify that I/we am/are authorised to make this application for registration and licence with RAK Free Trade Zone Authority, accept the obligation to settle all connected fees, certify that all information provided is correct to the best of my/our knowledge, and declare that I/we have read and fully understood RAK Free Trade Zone Authority's rules and regulations and all other governing documentation, undertaking to comply in full at all times, as may be amended from time to time.
documents.sourceRef: RAKEZ Application for Registration and Licence (Issue No. 03, Ref: LCN-019(A)) — p.3, 5. Undertaking
